calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for Ruth Eisenberg (Petitioner).

Ms. Espey stated that she is requesting that the Court confirm Mr. Eisenberg's one half interest in the home to Ms. Eisenberg because she is the named recipient in the will, that it is community property, that the will is missing, but they have a copy of it and that Mr. Eisenberg kept his business separate. Ms. Espey also stated that this is a coordinated plan, that the whole family is carrying out the plan, that Ms. Eisenberg's attorney had a deed drawn up stating her interest was separate property, and that she is also requesting that the Court confirm her half as community property and then she will transfer 100% to the Trust. In addition, Ms. Espey stated that the bulk of their request is confirming community property, that she can correct title, that she consulted with a title officer, that there is no problem with having the property re-granted to the Trust and that she thinks Ms. Eisenberg's attorney was so focused on avoiding probate that he did not do it correctly. The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
